The other delienation of the universal Rasi chart is that Sun
in Leo is the king and Moon in Cancer is the Queen. Mars in
Aries and Scorpio gives energy to the king and queen. Venus in
Taums and Libra gives lust to the King and the Queen. As a
result children -Mercury in Gemini and Virgo are born. To ensure
that the King & Queen in Capricorn and Acquarius and delivers
their Karma. In the periods of trouble faced by the King and the
Queen, Jupiter sitting in Sagittarius and Pisces gives protection and
wisdom to the King and Queen-Sun and Moon.

24 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY
Thus is explained the position of various planets, in various
Zodiacal signs, in the Universal Rasi chart.
INTERCHANGE OF PLANETS (PARIVARTHANA)
Interchange or parivarthana of planets can be explained
easily with an example.
For instance A' will be in the house of B' and B in the
house of *!J(. Similarly 'C'will be in the house ofD' and D' will
be in the house of 'C.
